ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "mosquito_count" INTEGER /* Count of mosquitoes observed on that date */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature recorded (in Celsius) */,
  "rain_per_day" REAL /* Rainfall recorded for the day (in mm) */,
  "cumulative_rain" REAL /* Cumulative rainfall up to that date (in mm) */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed recorded (in m/s) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage recorded */,
  "steam_pressure" REAL /* Steam pressure (in hPa) */,
  "sunshine_time" REAL /* Sunshine time (in hours) */,
  "sunshine_duration" REAL /* Total sunshine duration (in hours) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the region (in meters) */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure (in hPa) */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Percentage of cloud cover */,
  "uv_index" REAL /* UV index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region center */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region center */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the region (in square kilometers) */,
  "climate_type" TEXT /* Type of climate in the region */,
  "mosquito_control_measures" TEXT /* Description of mosquito control measures in place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "transmission_method" TEXT /* Method of transmission (e.g., vector-borne) */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Common symptoms associated with the disease */,
  "incubation_period" TEXT /* Incubation period of the disease */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Mortality rate associated with the disease (in percentage) */,
  "transmission_rate" REAL /* Transmission rate of the disease (e.g., R0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_outbreaks" (
  "outbreak_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outbreak record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region affected */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disease causing the outbreak */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the outbreak */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the outbreak */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases reported during the outbreak */,
  "community_response" TEXT /* Description of community response to the outbreak */,
  "intervention_measures" TEXT /* Description of intervention measures taken */,
  "estimated_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of managing the outbreak (in USD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outbreak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_outbreaks_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_outbreaks_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Research Institute) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., Government Agency, NGO) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the data source (1-10) */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last data update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record being assessed */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data (1-10) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the quality assessment */,
  "date_assessed" TEXT /* Date when the data quality was assessed */,
  "assessed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who assessed the data quality */,
  "reassessment_needed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if a reassessment is needed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correlations" (
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correlation study record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data record used in the analysis */,
  "factor" TEXT /* Weather factor analyzed (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "correlation_value" REAL /* Value of the correlation (e.g., r-value) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the correlation analysis */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the correlation */,
  "statistical_significance" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the correlation is statistically significant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correlations_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "outbreak_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outbreak that triggered the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., alert, reminder) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "response_required" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if a response is required from the user */,
  "response_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the user to respond */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_outbreak_id FOREIGN KEY ("outbreak_id") REFERENCES disease_outbreaks ("outbreak_id")
)
